label: U.S. NYC sales persona image generation pilot
reviewCriteria: The person is clearly an adult and looks consistent across all photos.
The photo feels like a real dating-app profile image, not a stock ad, fashion campaign, or fitness-only profile.
Name, gender, ethnicity, age, height, body type, and activity context remain plausible.
No logos, readable text, watermarks, celebrity resemblance, distorted hands, duplicated faces, or ambiguous profile owner.
The photo set includes normal social, cultural, food, active, and portrait variety without skewing toward running.
